domain: Filipino Arnis / Eskrima / Kali (national martial art of the Philippines; weapon-based stick + knife + open-hand drills; sinawali double-stick flow-weaving; progressive ladder single-stick → double-stick → empty-hand → knife → sword; three-range partition long/medium/close; pace-locked early — speed increases only on prior-step mastery)
specific_mechanism: SINAWALI-FLOW: multi-modal flow-drill curriculum with range-ladder + pace-lock + back-feed. (1) 5-stage skill ladder L_1..L_5 (modality-aligned: token-level, reasoning-step, multi-step plan, tool-use, multi-agent — analog of stick→empty-hand→knife→sword). (2) Each stage trained as flow drill — short interlocking sequence at fixed pace P_0, with sequential graduation to P_max only on mastery threshold m_i. (3) Range partition: per-stage sub-curricula long/medium/close (e.g., for reasoning: 1-hop / 3-hop / multi-step). (4) Cross-modality back-feed: gradients from late stages (multi-agent) propagate back to refine early stages (token-level). (5) Pace-lock: early step's speed-increase gated on m_i mastery, not on time elapsed.
llm_application: SINAWALI-FLOW for LLM curriculum training: 5-stage multi-modal skill ladder + per-stage range partition + pace-locked mastery threshold + late-early back-feed gradient. Differs from VL-Cogito PCuRL 2507.22607 (3-stage easy/medium/hard with difficulty-soft weighting — same data, different modalities), WISDOM (gradually synthesize CoT easy-to-hard — single modality), Curriculum Learning LLM Pretraining 2601.21698 (pacing + interleaved variants), Limits CL Post-Training (mixed CL results). Differs from R458 AIKIDO-KATA (paired uke-tori mastery-gate, not multi-modal range-ladder), R432 SONGLINE-CURRICULUM (spatial waypoint), R407, R410 training-method sisters, R446 OTEA-APARIMA (paired SFT+RL precision-speed) by EXPLICIT MULTI-MODAL RANGE-LADDER + PACE-LOCK + LATE-EARLY BACK-FEED.
novelty_claim: VL-Cogito + WISDOM + Curriculum LLM + Limits CL cover progressive-difficulty curriculum LLM. SINAWALI-FLOW adds (a) multi-modal skill ladder + (b) range-partition per stage + (c) pace-locked mastery threshold + (d) late-early back-feed gradient. Recombination — multi-modal + back-prop are mainstream.
